section_name: Penalties for Failure to Yield Right-of-way Offense Resulting in Collision
text:
If it is shown on the trial of an offense under this subtitle in which an element is the failure by the operator of a vehicle to yield the right-of-way to another vehicle that a collision resulted from the operator’s failure to yield the right-of-way:

(1) the offense is punishable by a fine of not less than $500 or more than $2,000, if a person other than the operator of the vehicle suffered bodily injury, as defined by Section 1.07 (Definitions) , Penal Code, in the collision; and

(2) the offense is punishable by a fine of not less than $1,000 or more than $4,000, if a person other than the operator of the vehicle suffered serious bodily injury, as defined by Section 1.07 (Definitions) , Penal Code, in the collision.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 542. Gen. Provisions
##### § 542.4045 — Penalties for Failure to Yield Right-of-way Offense Resulting in Collision

If it is shown on the trial of an offense under this subtitle in which an element is the failure by the operator of a vehicle to yield the right-of-way to another vehicle that a collision resulted from the operator’s failure to yield the right-of-way:

    (1) the offense is punishable by a fine of not less than $500 or more than $2,000, if a person other than the operator of the vehicle suffered bodily injury, as defined by Section 1.07 (Definitions) , Penal Code, in the collision; and

    (2) the offense is punishable by a fine of not less than $1,000 or more than $4,000, if a person other than the operator of the vehicle suffered serious bodily injury, as defined by Section 1.07 (Definitions) , Penal Code, in the collision.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 709 (H.B.2190), Sec. 30, eff. September 1, 2023.*

the offense is punishable by a fine of not less than $500 or more than $2,000, if a person other than the operator of the vehicle suffered bodily injury, as defined by Section 1.07 (Definitions) , Penal Code, in the collision; and

the offense is punishable by a fine of not less than $1,000 or more than $4,000, if a person other than the operator of the vehicle suffered serious bodily injury, as defined by Section 1.07 (Definitions) , Penal Code, in the collision.
